sections.paragraph:
Original: רך

Transliteration: rak

Phonetic: rak

BDB Definition:

  1. tender, soft, delicate, weak
    1. tender, delicate (of flesh)
    2. weak of heart, timid
    3. soft (of words)
      1. gentle words (substantive)

Origin: from H7401

TWOT entry: 2164a

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
